privileged_info_summary: The task involves a synthetic invoice HTML document for Invoice #8492 from Acme Cloud Services to Global Analytics Inc. with a total amount of $1,240.50 ($850 enterprise hosting + $250 SQL + $90 load balancer + $50.50 support = $1,240.50). The invoice contains three intentional distractions (FLASH SALE marketing banner, Chat with Agent widget, We use cookies footer) that must be removed before saving a clean PDF.
